checks.name: view_safety_ceiling
checks.description: View access is bounded: only ClinicalResearcher (clearance>3, not HighlyRestricted) or PrincipalInvestigator (riskScore<20, compliant device), on active projects, with department match or GlobalAuditor, and compliant device for HighlyRestricted

checks.name: edit_safety_ceiling
checks.description: Edit access is bounded: only ClinicalResearcher (clearance>3, not HighlyRestricted) or PrincipalInvestigator (riskScore<20, compliant device), on active projects, with department match or GlobalAuditor, and compliant device for HighlyRestricted

checks.name: active_project_gate_view
checks.description: View is only possible when projectStatus is Active

checks.name: active_project_gate_edit
checks.description: Edit is only possible when projectStatus is Active

checks.name: cross_dept_block_view
checks.description: View is forbidden when department != projectManagingDepartment unless GlobalAuditor

checks.name: cross_dept_block_edit
checks.description: Edit is forbidden when department != projectManagingDepartment unless GlobalAuditor

checks.name: device_compliance_highly_restricted_view
checks.description: View of HighlyRestricted documents requires compliant device, no exceptions

checks.name: device_compliance_highly_restricted_edit
checks.description: Edit of HighlyRestricted documents requires compliant device, no exceptions

checks.name: clinical_researcher_view_floor
checks.description: ClinicalResearcher with clearance>3, non-HighlyRestricted doc, active project, matching dept, compliant device, low risk score MUST be able to View

checks.name: principal_investigator_view_floor
checks.description: PrincipalInvestigator with riskScore<20, compliant device, active project, matching dept, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to View

checks.name: clinical_researcher_edit_floor
checks.description: ClinicalResearcher with clearance>3, non-HighlyRestricted doc, active project, matching dept, compliant device, low risk score MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: principal_investigator_edit_floor
checks.description: PrincipalInvestigator with riskScore<20, compliant device, active project, matching dept, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: liveness_view
checks.description: View policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_edit
checks.description: Edit policy is not trivially deny-all
